MPPSC is a government organization responsible for conducting recruitment exams for various government posts in Madhya Pradesh, India.
MPPSC aims to select the best candidates for government jobs through a fair and transparent recruitment process.

The MPPSC Assistant Town Planner Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for Indian citizens.
The programme aims to recruit 39 Assistant Town Planners for the Madhya Pradesh government.
